name: get_utilization
short_description: Compute utilization of device and returns a list of resources used for script processing
full_help:
get_utilization

Description: 
Compute utilization of device and returns a list of resources used for script processing

Syntax: 
get_utilization  [-cells <args>] [-exclude_cells <args>] [-pblocks <args>]
                 [-exclude_child_pblocks] [-exclude_non_assigned]
                 [-supplyAsPblockAreaSLR] [-ranges <args>] [-quiet] [-verbose]

Returns: 
Report

Usage: 
  Name                      Description
  -------------------------------------
  [-cells]                  Report utilization of given list of cells
  [-exclude_cells]          Report utilization of given list of excluded 
                            cells
  [-pblocks]                get utilization of given pblock
  [-exclude_child_pblocks]  get utilization with out child pblocks
  [-exclude_non_assigned]   Pblock utilization with out Non-assigned Cells
  [-supplyAsPblockAreaSLR]  For SLR wise report, Pblock supply per SLR is 
                            calculated on pblock area in the SLR
  [-ranges]                 Site ranges(s)
  [-quiet]                  Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]                Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Report
